steps.description: Click the "Create a new app" card located in the Developer Portal homepage to initiate the process for creating and registering a new app.

Type text: '${{var:app_name:tdp_app_#####}}'  into the 'Name' input field within the 'Create a new app' dialog box in the 'Apps' section of the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface.And input ${{var:app_name:tdp_app_#####}} into the run time variable.
Click the "Create" button in the "Create a new app" dialog within the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface.
